instruction: Apply this floral pattern only to the front of the shirt.
expected_behavior: Pattern appears on shirt front only; face, arms, and background stay unchanged.
pass_criteria: Targets shirt only and preserves surrounding objects.

instruction: Put this logo in the center of the shirt and keep everything else the same.
expected_behavior: Logo centered on shirt; no spill to skin or background.
pass_criteria: Centered logo placement on shirt only.

instruction: Apply this artwork directly onto the wall surface.
expected_behavior: Artwork appears on wall only; surrounding objects unchanged.

instruction: Make the main wall look like it has this pattern on it, but do not change anything else.
Wrap this floral artwork around the mug and keep the table unchanged.
expected_behavior: Artwork placed on mug body only.
pass_criteria: Mug edited without altering table or background.

instruction: Add this sticker design to the notebook cover only.
expected_behavior: Sticker design appears on notebook cover.

instruction: Turn the notebook cover into this style, but keep the desk unchanged.
Replace the blank poster area with this artwork.
expected_behavior: Artwork appears inside poster area only.
pass_criteria: Poster region updated without changing frame or wall.

instruction: Put this label design on the front face of the box only.
expected_behavior: Label applied to front panel only.

instruction: Place this logo on the center of the field without changing the sky or stands.
expected_behavior: Logo appears on grass region only.
pass_criteria: Grass edited only; non-field regions preserved.
